profile.biography: Enthusiastic and detail-oriented Junior Full Stack Developer with a passion for designing pixel-perfect client interfaces and optimized backend systems. Specializing in Node.js, React, TypeScript, and modern database architectures. I thrive on solving complex technical constraints and writing highly structured, maintainable code.
profile.title: Full Stack Developer Junior

projects.title: Titan Cloud API Security Gateway
projects.shortDescription: High-performance edge reverse proxy and authentication gateway designed for robust container environments.
projects.fullDescription: Titan provides secure, extremely responsive token verification, rate-limiting, and metric logging at the edge of dockerized services. Built to replace expensive enterprise proxies, it supports millions of daily requests with a memory footprint under 30MB. Includes a beautiful developer dashboard displaying active traffic, IP blocking controls, and automated rate profiles.

projects.title: Aether localized mobile calendar
projects.shortDescription: Minimalist cross-platform calendar application showcasing premium iOS-style gesture layouts and local push alarms.
projects.fullDescription: Aether is a gorgeous, tactile mobile application centering layout harmony and gesture control. Configured using React Native and calibrated for extreme visual consistency, it lets freelancers map working calendars, draft invoicing logs, and toggle instant alerts.

experiences.description: Pioneered backend API endpoints handling transactional logistics. Refactored client dashboard using React 19 and Tailwind CSS, speeding up interactive load speeds by 40%. Implemented responsive mobile layouts and synchronized state pipelines.

softSkills.title: Rigueur et Organisation
softSkills.description: Attentif aux détails et à la qualité du travail fourni. J'accorde une importance particulière à la fiabilité du code, au respect des bonnes pratiques et à la réalisation de projets bien structurés.

softSkills.title: Communication et Esprit d'Équipe
softSkills.description: Capable de collaborer efficacement au sein d'une équipe, de partager mes idées clairement et de vulgariser des concepts techniques pour différents interlocuteurs.

softSkills.title: Résolution de Problèmes
softSkills.description: J'aime analyser les défis techniques, identifier leurs causes et concevoir des solutions adaptées, performantes et évolutives.
